title: eriogonum ursinum
intro: Eriogonum ursinum, also known as bear's clover or grizzly clover, is a perennial plant species native to North America, characterized by its clusters of small white or pink flowers. The medicinal properties of Eriogonum ursinum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating digestive problems. Eriogonum ursinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, with some herbalists suggesting that it can be used topically for skin conditions and wounds.
